site.name: Lumen Studio
site.description: Independent photographer's portfolio, capturing stories of portrait, landscape and street photography.

hero.title:
Writing time
through a lens
hero.subtitle: Lumen Studio · Independent Photographer
hero.description: Over ten years across more than twenty countries, capturing fleeting moments of light, shadow and humanity. Each frame is a frozen breath.

about.title: About the Photographer
about.subtitle: 关于摄影师
about.intro: I'm Lumen, an independent photographer based in Shanghai and Tokyo. I started with film photography ten years ago and gradually shifted to a hybrid workflow of digital and medium format. I believe photography is not about recording reality, but freezing a way of seeing the world.
about.bio2: My work has been featured in National Geographic China and Photography World, exhibited at the Museum of Contemporary Art Shanghai and Kyotographie. Commercial clients include Sony, MUJI, and Nike.

timelineItems.title: Started Photography
timelineItems.desc: Bought my first film camera, a Pentax K1000.

timelineItems.title: First Solo Exhibition
timelineItems.desc: Held solo exhibition 'Silent Afternoon' in Shanghai.

timelineItems.title: National Geographic Feature
timelineItems.desc: Work 'Homeward in the Mist' featured in National Geographic China.

timelineItems.title: Kyotographie
timelineItems.desc: Invited to the group show at Kyotographie International Photography Festival.

timelineItems.title: Studio Established
timelineItems.desc: Founded dual-city studios in Shanghai and Tokyo.
